Before I reschedule it to 2024-05-20 starting at 10:00 (keeping the original 1-hour duration), I need two confirmations from you:

1) Please confirm that this is the correct event to reschedule.  
2) Provide the clinic's email address (or confirm you want me to add the clinic contact if it's already in your contacts). The calendar will email all participants automatically when the event is rescheduled; I will add the clinic email to participants so both you and the clinic are notified.
